score CHAR 2 The data in this column is the resident's total severity score. 00 to 27=Severity score
99=Unable to complete the interview effective 10/01/2023
884 SCL_ISLTN_CD SCL_ISLTN_CD D0700 Social Isolation CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident feels lonely or isolated from those around them. 0=Never
1=Rarely
2=Sometimes
3=Often
4=Always
7=Resident declines to respond
8=Resident unable to respond effective 10/01/2023
885 LMTN_UPR_XTRMTY_CD LMTN_UPR_XTRMTY_CD
